FOOTER.ABOUT_TEXT: Welcome to Bookazia, your go-to online bookstore for the best reads! Created by Cas Janssen a student at Leiden University of Applied Sciences. It is a fullstack application built with Angular, Spring Boot and PostgreSQL.

HOME.TAGLINE: Discover a world of stories, knowledge, and adventure at Bookazia - your premier online bookstore.

BENEFITS.KNOWLEDGE_DESC: Books are gateways to new information, ideas, and perspectives.
BENEFITS.STRESS_DESC: Reading can lower stress levels by up to 68% and promote better sleep.
BENEFITS.IMAGINATION_DESC: Stories transport you to new worlds and kindle creativity.
BENEFITS.FOCUS_DESC: Regular reading enhances concentration and cognitive abilities.

NEWSLETTER.TITLE: Stay Updated
NEWSLETTER.SUBTITLE: Subscribe to our newsletter for exclusive offers, new releases, and literary insights.

FAQ.TITLE: Frequently Asked Questions
FAQ.SUBTITLE: Find answers to the most common questions about Bookazia's services, products, and policies.

NO_RESULTS.TITLE: No matching questions found
NO_RESULTS.SUBTITLE: Try using different keywords or browse by category

ADDITIONAL_HELP.TITLE: Still have questions?
ADDITIONAL_HELP.CONTENT: If you couldn't find the answer you're looking for, please contact our customer support team.

SHIPPING_NORMAL.QUESTION: How long does normal shipping take?
SHIPPING_NORMAL.ANSWER: Standard shipping takes 2-5 business days within the Netherlands. International shipping typically takes 7-14 business days, depending on the destination country.

SHIPPING_EXPRESS.QUESTION: How long does express shipping take?
SHIPPING_EXPRESS.ANSWER: Express shipping takes 1-2 business days within the Netherlands. For international express shipping, delivery times may vary based on the destination.

TRACK_ORDER.QUESTION: How do I track my order?
TRACK_ORDER.ANSWER: Once your order has been shipped, you will receive a confirmation email with tracking information. You can also view your order status and tracking information in your account dashboard under "My orders".

CHANGE_ORDER.QUESTION: Can I change or cancel my order?
CHANGE_ORDER.ANSWER: Orders cannot be modified or canceled yet. If their is any problem with your order, please contact our customer service team as soon as possible. We will do our best to assist you.

GIFT_WRAPPING.QUESTION: Do you offer gift wrapping?
GIFT_WRAPPING.ANSWER: No sadly we do not offer gift wrapping at this time. However, we are working on it! Please check back later.

EBOOKS.QUESTION: Are e-books available for all titles?
EBOOKS.ANSWER: Most new releases and bestsellers are available in e-book format, but our entire catalog is not digitized. Mostly because ebooks are not provided yet!

RESET_PASSWORD.QUESTION: How do I reset my password?
RESET_PASSWORD.ANSWER: Click on the "Forgot Password" link on the login page. Enter your email address, and we will send you instructions to reset your password. For security reasons, password reset links are only valid for 24 hours.

INTERNATIONAL_SHIPPING.QUESTION: Do you ship internationally?
INTERNATIONAL_SHIPPING.ANSWER: Yes, we ship to most countries worldwide. Shipping costs and delivery times vary by location. International shipping options will be shown at checkout based on your delivery address.

REQUEST_BOOK.QUESTION: Can I request a book that is not in your inventory?
REQUEST_BOOK.ANSWER: Yes! We accept special order requests for books not currently in our catalog. Please contact our staff with details about the book, including ISBN if available. Special orders typically take 1-3 weeks to fulfill.

PAYMENT_METHODS.QUESTION: What payment methods do you accept?
PAYMENT_METHODS.ANSWER: We accept all major credit cards (Visa, Mastercard, American Express), PayPal, iDEAL, and bank transfers.

UPDATE_ACCOUNT.QUESTION: How do I update my account information?
UPDATE_ACCOUNT.ANSWER: Log in to your account and click on "Account". In the dropdown menu you can see the option "Edit Profile". From there, you can update your personal information, and manage your communication preferences.
